issues.description: PowerBoost action missing selection logic. Card text requires selecting UP TO 2 characters with different power reductions (−3000 and −2000). DSL applies −3000 to AllOpponentCharacters without distinction.
Duration should be 'DuringOpponentTurn' (until end of opponent's next turn), not 'EndOfTurn'. Text states 'until the end of your opponent's next turn' which is a specific opponent-turn duration.
KO action uses 'ChooseOpponentCharacter' but missing explicit 'maxPower:3000' constraint in target scope. Should enforce power limit in target selection.
Card text says 'up to 1' (optional), but KO action structure doesn't clearly express optionality. Should use 'maxCount:1' with optional semantics.

suggestedDsl.effectText: [On Play] Select up to 2 of your opponent's Characters, and give 1 Character −3000 power and the other −2000 power until the end of your opponent's next turn. Then, K.O. up to 1 of your opponent's Characters with 3000 power or less.
